title: disa aurata
intro: Disa aurata, also known as the Golden Disa, is a terrestrial orchid species found in South Africa. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Disa aurata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Disa aurata can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by steeping the dried roots in hot water, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as fever and digestive issues.
